Synonym: y-maze; y-maze alternation; Y-maze; spontaneous alternation Y-maze
Measure: % spontaneous alternation (entries into novel arm vs. total arm entries); % spontaneous alternation among the three arms; % spontaneous alternations and arm entry sequence

Measure: Retention of carbol fuchsin in mycobacteria after acid‐alcohol decolorization

Synonym: zte-cbv fmri
Measure: CBV-weighted activation with zero-time-echo SE sequence + iron-oxide CA; CBV-weighted signal with zero-time-echo + iron-oxide CA (T₁ shortening, TE→0)

Synonym: positron emission tomography; PET imaging; metabolic PET
Measure: Standard uptake value (SUV); SUV_max; SUV_mean
